    Site

    Control the site layout and navigation.

    HUD Position

    Move the navigation bar around the screen.

    Confirm Before Leaving

    Show an “Are you sure you want to leave?” warning when closing, reloading, or leaving SquiddCoreOS.

    Confirm Before Leaving

    Show an “Are you sure you want to leave?” warning when closing, reloading, or navigating away from SquiddCoreOS.

    Mobile Mode

    Makes the site easier to use on phones. You can turn it on or off anytime.

    Language

    Use the left sidebar to switch sections. Changes apply instantly.

    Pick your preferred locale for time formatting and future language support.
    Language
    English is the default. Other options adjust locale formatting.
    Military Time
    Uses 24-hour clock format (only affects the top-right time).
    Background

    Choose your own home wallpaper or keep the original SquiddCoreOS background.

    Custom Home Wallpaper

    Choose an image from your device. Removing it brings back this version’s original wallpaper.
